messages.content: 英语重写：Moreover, an increased proportion of low-coordinated Ni sites within the Ni cluster can upshift its d-band center, resulting in a more active surface that favors the adsorption and activation of the reactants.

In addition, a greater percentage of Ni sites with poor coordination in the Ni cluster can shift its d-band center upwards, leading to a surface that is more active and promotes the adsorption and activation of the reactants.

Furthermore, a higher proportion of Ni sites with low coordination in the Ni cluster can elevate its d-band center, resulting in a more active surface that facilitates the adsorption and activation of the reactants.
英文重写：Further analysis reveals that the smaller Ni NPs enhanced the metal-acid synergy, leading to a higher selectivity to isomers than that of the larger counterpart.

Upon further examination, it was discovered that the smaller Ni nanoparticles improved the metal-acid synergy, resulting in a greater selectivity towards isomers than in the case of larger nanoparticles.
Consequently, there was a higher selectivity towards isomers due to the improved metal-acid synergy in the smaller Ni nanoparticles compared to their larger counterparts.

换成which：Moreover, an increased proportion of low-coordinated Ni sites within the Ni cluster can upshift its d-band center, leading to a more active surface that favors the adsorption and activation of the reactants.

The increased proportion of low-coordinated Ni sites within the Ni cluster can upshift its d-band center, which results in a more active surface that favors the adsorption and activation of reactants.
语法检查： Fig. 4a-d manifest uniformly dispersed Ni particles in all four catalysts without apparent aggregation.
这个句子的语法是正确的。
"manifest" 是谓语动词，表示 "呈现" 的意思。
语法检查：The above results confirm that the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts with various sizes of Ni NPs (5.3 nm, 7.2 nm, 9.7 nm, 11.7 nm) are successfully synthesized.
这个句子的语法是正确的。
可以替换成are due to，are caused by，are a result of等。
